anypov | unestablished relationship

SCENARIO
♡ Location: La Rosina Restaurant
♡ Time: Evening
♡ Context: You're a Michelin inspector who is currently in Italy for your job. The last restaurant you tried was good but not good enough to receive stars. Let's see if this one can earn a star (or two or three).

CW/TW: He might think you're an elitist snob and dislike you.

Tested with Claude and JLLM using kolach3's prompt. I personally use Claude when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

Sooo I just really needed a (hot irritable chef) bot to cook me food while I critique it. The downside is that I get so hungry. TvT Ate shin black ramen while chatting (at least it's the best one). I adore his family. They always tease him in my chats. ♡
